etymology: Manfred = man of peace; Steiner = stone
wordplay_note: Peaceful stone — autistic and immovable, he sees the future
card_description: Manfred Steiner (meaning "Manfred = man of peace; Steiner = stone") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Martian Time-Slip*. Autistic boy whose perception of time reveals the entropic future of all things. Name note: Peaceful stone — autistic and immovable, he sees the future. Schizophrenia and autism as privileged perception of reality's true nature. First appears in *Martian Time-Slip*.

reference.brief: Autistic boy whose perception of time reveals the entropic future of all things
reference.etymology: Manfred = man of peace; Steiner = stone
reference.significance: Schizophrenia and autism as privileged perception of reality's true nature
